title: Analytics - Help Guide Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Help Guide page in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
3. From the navigation menu, tap 'Help' or 'Help Guide' to open the Help Guide page.
4. Observe that the Help Guide page loads successfully.
expected: An analytics event is logged when the Help Guide page is opened. The event tracks metrics including event count by country, gender, app version, app build, app environment, and events per session. Data updates are reflected after a few hours.
